title: Execute R4: Clean environment auto deployment regression test
description: Log in to test2, run the cleanup commands to reset it to a clean state. Execute './pmf-init.sh --yes' with script logging to logs/r4_clean.txt. Validate that all fixes apply on a clean Ubuntu.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN pmf-init.sh runs on clean test2 in --yes mode THEN apt-get update runs exactly once; AND global npm install commands automatically prepend 'sudo -E'; AND agy installs via curl instead of npm; AND graphify . is skipped safely due to missing API Key without 20s delay; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-14-fixes-regression-test-design.md:43
review_initial_requirements: Verify terminal log r4_clean.txt shows apt update once, npm sudo prepend, agy curl install, and graphify skipped.
review_regression_requirements: Verify the script does not crash and behaves correctly on a completely clean system.

title: Execute R5: Interactive install and skip log format regression test
description: Clean graphify and ~/.agents directory on test2. Run 'export GEMINI_API_KEY=\dummy_key_123\"'. Execute './pmf-init.sh' in interactive mode. Interactively choose to skip some components (using 'n' or 's') and record to logs/r5_clean.txt."
acceptance_criteria: WHEN GEMINI_API_KEY is exported THEN graphify warn prompt is displayed; WHEN choosing to skip component/phase THEN console outputs unified log format '⏭️ [component]: 用户跳过'; WHEN Phase 7 runs THEN report captures all skipped items in reports; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-14-fixes-regression-test-design.md:58
review_initial_requirements: Verify r5_clean.txt shows API key warning and unified skip logs; verify final report parsing of skipped items.
review_regression_requirements: Verify that manually skipping components does not break subsequent phases.

title: Execute R6: Second run no-reinstall regression test
description: Keep the R5 environment on test2. Re-run './pmf-init.sh' interactively, accepting all defaults. Record to logs/r6_clean.txt.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN running on already configured env THEN all installed tools are recognized as FOUND_LATEST; AND no package is reinstalled; AND final Phase 7 status table displays all OK or SKIPPED; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-14-fixes-regression-test-design.md:79
review_initial_requirements: Verify r6_clean.txt shows FOUND_LATEST for all components; verify no installer script runs; verify final status table shows OK.

title: Collect test logs and compile regression report
description: Retrieve all test logs (r4_clean.txt, r5_clean.txt, r6_clean.txt) and generated reports from test2 to local docs/testing/2026-06-14-real-machine/. Write structured regression-report.md summarizing test results.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN logs are fetched THEN they are committed to local repo under docs/testing/2026-06-14-real-machine/; WHEN report is written THEN it evaluates FIX-01~05 against expectation with explicit PASS/FAIL verdict; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-14-fixes-regression-test-design.md:92
review_initial_requirements: Verify all logs exist locally; verify regression-report.md evaluates all 5 fixes and contains R4/R5/R6 metrics.
review_regression_requirements: Verify that the regression report format complies with the design spec.

title: Review documented vision against delivered work
description: Use a same-model sub-agent review to compare approved-doc claims with delivered behavior, evidence level, CSV state, validation evidence, and review log.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN all non-review issues before this row are closed THEN run same-model sub-agent review against source-specific claim/evidence checks; WHEN gaps or overstated claims are found THEN append follow-up issues and REVIEW-02; WHEN no gaps remain THEN close the CSV.
review_initial_requirements: Verify all prior non-review rows are closed before running this review.
review_regression_requirements: Run same-model sub-agent review against approved doc goals, non-goals, acceptance criteria, delivered diff, validation evidence, prior review logs, and source-specific claim/evidence alignment checks. Task-specific checks: (1) R4: verify apt-get update runs exactly once, sudo -E preserves proxy, npm uses sudo, agy uses curl, graphify . auto-skips; (2) R5: verify API Key警告 and log_skip格式; (3) R6: verify FOUND_LATEST; (4) Report: verify docs/testing/2026-06-14-real-machine/regression-report.md is complete with PASS/FAIL verdicts.
